description: A plain official press/event photograph (no on-image text or graphic design) of a state arrival ceremony in Beijing. President Donald Trump (in a dark suit with a red tie and flag pin) walks side by side with Chinese President Xi Jinping (dark suit, maroon tie) down a long red carpet. At left, a Chinese People's Liberation Army honor-guard soldier in dress uniform with sword and white gloves marches in parallel; at right, a long rank of honor-guard troops stands at attention shouldering bayoneted rifles. Manicured trees and an ornate lamppost frame the formal outdoor setting. This is a straightforward documentary photo of a diplomatic event, not a designed meme. The tweet caption reads: 'A powerful arrival ceremony in Beijing.' with US and China flag emoji.
